title: SPONGE Signed Spectral Diagnostic: Tau Sensitivity, K-Selection, and Signed vs Unsigned Decomposition Analysis
summary: Demo notebook for the SPONGE Signed Spectral Diagnostic experiment. Demonstrates signed (SPONGE) vs unsigned spectral clustering on synthetic Co-Information matrices across 4 variants (easy_2mod_xor, medium_4mod_mixed, hard_4mod_unequal, highdim_8mod). Runs 5 investigations: tau sensitivity sweep (7x7 grid), k-selection analysis (eigengap/silhouette/stability), signed vs unsigned decomposition (sign distribution, condition numbers, Grassmann distance), high-dimensional fix (sparsification/threshold zeroing), and final verdict with root cause diagnosis. Uses pre-computed CoI matrices with planted module structure. Full parameter sweep runs in ~48 seconds.
